name: 基本位移
subject: pe
domain_name: 运动技能 / Movement Skills / Movement Skills
curriculum_points: Analyze and apply fundamental locomotor skills (running, jumping, hopping, skipping) to demonstrate efficient and controlled movement in a variety of physical activities, linking to Criterion B: Movement Composition.

Evaluate the effectiveness of locomotor skill application in individual and group contexts, demonstrating an understanding of biomechanical principles (e.g., force, balance) to improve performance, as per Criterion A: Knowing and Understanding.
